description: Cardano (ADA) is the native token of Cardano blockchain launched in 2017 to enable secure, scalable, and sustainable transactions. As extended utility on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 ADA offers instant finality, ultra-low fees, massive throughput, and enterprise-grade scalability, powering decentralized applications and commercialized performance far beyond its original network.
name: Cardano
